title: carex × subviridula
intro: Carex × subviridula, also known as the intermediate sedge, is a hybrid plant species of the sedge family, combining characteristics of Carex subspatha and Carex viridula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Carex × subviridula is often used in decoctions or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas for its purported health benefits.
